meaning: adv.在货币问题上 从金钱角度 财政上
examples: I keep growing all the time. I find great rewards both monetarily and mentally.
When a father can't provide monetarily for his offspring, he often becomes estranged.
The researchers determined that this person was a less valuable team member - monetarily that is.
And speaking of monetarily, why do men make more money than women do for the same position?
It does require all of the employers to monetarily assume the burden of this expense.
